statuses.meaning: Payload or route exists locally but has not been previewed.
Payload was built and inspected without delivery.
Delivery is waiting for an endpoint, retry, or operator action.
Producer posted or exported the payload successfully.
Consumer parsed and retained the payload.
Consumer refused the payload for schema, routing, safety, or policy reasons.
Delivery failed before acceptance or rejection was known.
Registry or a producer regenerated a prior payload for another delivery attempt.
Consumer acknowledged receipt back to the source app.
Operator intentionally removed an item from an inbox, queue, or retry list.
